Patch Set 13: Code-Review+1

no kernel build is needed for lustre client builds, would prefer a solution that avoids kernel builds for patchless servers too.  This mod is an improvement over current state, but still does a kernel build even when no patches are applied.  maybe stopping unneeded builds can be a future mod.

Patch Set 13: Code-Review-1

I'll see if I can approach this without rebuilding kernel

parents.subject: LU-9917 lnet: rediscover peer if it changed

commit.subject: LU-9907 build: add patchless server for lbuild
commit.message:
LU-9907 build: add patchless server for lbuild

Adding lbuild support for building patchless server
Cleanup unused TARGET_ARCHS and BUILD_ARCHS

Test-Parameters: trivial

Change-Id: I946352fa243c86d5729779406264e6ee37856145
Signed-off-by: Minh Diep <minh.diep@intel.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/28672
Reviewed-by: Bob Glossman <bob.glossman@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Nathaniel Clark <nathaniel.l.clark@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
